details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter:

- INV-0006 (issued 2025-12-11)

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Performed outbound write; now verifying final outbox content since file cannot be rewritten. Need confirm attachments, recipient, YAML safety, then cleanup inbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read newly written outbox file for verification
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft file was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox file: recipient canonical, subject YAML-quoted, single attachment path valid and read, ordering rule satisfied with one item. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Read back the outbound draft and confirmed it contains one attachment to the oldest Claudia-linked invoice file.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was to take care of next inbox message. Completed by reading lowest inbox item, verifying sender identity against miles entity, resolving Claudia and linked invoices, selecting oldest one (2025-12-11 INV-0006), drafting outbound email record, and deleting processed inbox file. Completeness: request asked oldest 1 invoice; identified full Helios set (6) then selected oldest correctly. Numeric/arithmetic not applicable.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message and prepared a reply draft with the oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter attached. Then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS files on folder entry, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, resolved identities via cast primary_contact_email, followed sending-email workflow for outbox file format, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request (00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md) asked to reply with the oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter. Sender from header matched canonical miles primary email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Claudia was resolved from 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Invoice search by canonical Helios identifier found linked records; oldest confirmed by reading 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with that attachment and then deleted processed inbox file.

read finance AGENTS and invoices AGENTS
write outbound email draft in outbox
read back outbox draft for verification
